ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the equipment in the deployment (e.g., data logger, sensor) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was purchased */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the equipment */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployment_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the deployment site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the deployment site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deployment site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the site (e.g., volcanic, crater lake) */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the site */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed environmental conditions of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment deployed */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the equipment is deployed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the deployment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the deployment ended (null if still active) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the deployment */,
  "deployed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deployed the equipment */,
  "deployment_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions during deployment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the deployment (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_deployed_by FOREIGN KEY ("deployed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES deployment_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that received maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., calibration, repair) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_maintenance_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_maintenance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that generated the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was recorded */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., error, warning, info) */,
  "log_data" TEXT /* Detailed log data (e.g., error message, sensor readings) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the log entry */,
  "logged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the entry */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the log (e.g., critical, high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_logs_logged_by FOREIGN KEY ("logged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
